summary: Project with a hero section featuring an AI illustration background image, with finance details (90% loan / 10% customer) and Samaleswari Temple theme.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- AI illustration of a solar energy landscape with solar panels, bright sunshine rays, green fields, and a clear sky in a vibrant modern illustrated art style (hero-ai-illustration.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Generate an AI illustration image suitable for a solar energy services hero background — vibrant and modern, depicting solar panels, sunshine, and a clean energy landscape in an illustrated art style — and save it as the hero background asset.

Update the Hero component to use the newly generated AI illustration image (hero-ai-illustration.png from frontend/public/assets/generated/) as the hero section background, replacing the current Samaleswari Temple background image.

new_feature_requests.summary: Replace hero background with an AI illustration image
